summary:
\boxed{The preferred method checks involuntary neurological function rather than subjective reports; tapping nerve paths elicits consistent physical responses indicating effective pain transmission mechanisms.}

Key Points:

- Objective assessment using physiologic markers
- Tapping nerve paths results in measurable physical responses Summary justification based on Agent’s logic focuses primarily on how certain neurophysiological assessments provide an unambiguous measure of pain by observing mechanical or electrical stimuli-induced motor neuron activity compared with more qualitative measures relying solely on verbal feedback. This aligns closely with identifying appropriate tools that can reliably demonstrate functional integrity along suspected nociceptive pathways independent of individual variability in reporting sensations accurately under stress conditions typical when experiencing significant discomfort/pain states. Thus emphasizing utility over other potential options not involving direct measurement but instead indirect inference techniques less likely providing definitive proof regarding
